purpose: Index the created GenLayer Intelligent Contracts and the review path for each one.

entries.title: SignalGuard source-grounded claim review
entries.purpose: Store the latest consensus-backed verdict for a claim checked against a public source URL.

entries.title: SignalGuard history milestone prototype
entries.purpose: Extend the base review flow with append-only review history and review_count state.
genlayer_features: public view methods for latest verdict and review count

boundaries: The catalog indexes created contracts and prototypes; Project submission remains the main product entry.
The history contract is a milestone prototype, not the currently deployed Studio address.
Reviewers should inspect the source files and published evidence hub before scoring.
